creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Tue Aug 28 12:43:09 2012
New Revision: 303284
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303284

Log:
  The account invoice is a module for tryton. It defines data model
  and business logic for creating invoices.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		170554
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/
  head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:37:09 2012	(r303283)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:43:09 2012	(r303284)
@@ -105,6 +105,7 @@
     SUBDIR += tryton
     SUBDIR += trytond
     SUBDIR += trytond_account
+    SUBDIR += trytond_account_invoice
     SUBDIR += trytond_company
     SUBDIR += trytond_country
     SUBDIR += trytond_currency

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/Makefile	Tue Aug 28 12:43:09 2012	(r303284)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_account_invoice
+# Date created:		12 August, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_account_invoice
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	The Account Invoice Module for Tryton
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_account_product>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_account_product
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/distinfo	Tue Aug 28 12:43:09 2012	(r303284)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_account_invoice-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 8eae98a70a4396390b5a19edf434c8e8ac1c89027199afd111f74547a1bbfa24
+SIZE (trytond_account_invoice-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 101498

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account_invoice/pkg-descr	Tue Aug 28 12:43:09 2012	(r303284)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+The account invoice is a module for tryton. It defines data model
+and business logic for creating invoices.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
